summary: On a per-prompt mid-render timeout, batch's text output must report how many images rendered before the failure, not just FAILED.
reason: runGeneration returns the designs that finished before a timeout (already downloaded if --download was set); generate/redo surface that partial work but batch's text path only printed FAILED, hiding it. Extends the partial-render-on-timeout contract from artistly-review-fixes to batch.
validated_outcome: go build ./..., go vet ./..., and go test ./internal/cli/ pass.
